## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt` (or `go fmt ./...`) run
- [ ] `make lint` (`golangci-lint run`) passes
- [ ] `make test` (`go test -race ./...`) passes

- [ ] Public API changes are documented (comments / `doc.go` / examples) and called out above
